name: sqlserver-postgres-performance-advisor
description: AI-native, governance-first SQL Server and PostgreSQL orchestration plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Safety-governed SQL Server and PostgreSQL agentic DB operations.
interface.longDescription: CodexDB Agent implements SQL read tooling, governed write workflows, risk-based execution controls, explainability, and compliance-oriented operations for SQL Server and PostgreSQL.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use CodexDB Agent for governance-aware SQL Server and PostgreSQL analysis and operations.
